entities.name: triple glucagon/GLP-1/GIP receptor agonist peptide

attributes.formulation: fatty acid conjugation or PEGylation at lysine residues

entities.context: The invention concerns a triple agonist peptide possessing activities to all of glucagon, GLP-1, and GIP receptors, and its applications in treating metabolic disorders including obesity, type 2 diabetes, dyslipidemia, and non-alcoholic fatty liver disease.

entities.name: retatrutide
entities.context: Retatrutide (LY3437943), developed by Eli Lilly, is a related triple GIP/GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist currently in Phase 3 clinical trials that has demonstrated up to 24% body weight reduction in Phase 2 studies.

entities.name: GLP-1 receptor
entities.context: The triple agonist approach simultaneously activates glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor for glucose-dependent insulin secretion and appetite suppression.

entities.name: GIP receptor
entities.context: glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide (GIP) receptor for enhanced insulin response and lipid metabolism

entities.name: glucagon receptor
entities.context: glucagon receptor (GCGR) for increased energy expenditure and hepatic lipid oxidation
